name: Navigation
summary: Apple-store-like navigation with black top bar and restrained secondary rails.
structurePatterns: Global nav uses dark surface and compact type
Secondary rails can scroll horizontally on narrow widths
Mobile tab bar uses blur and safe-area awareness

structures.name: Global Web Navigation

structures.name: Mobile Tab Bar
structures.description: Blurred bottom tab bar with 4-5 destinations and generous tap areas.
